title: Working Armorers
description: Armorers wear their mask when they work.
body:
![WORKING ARMORERS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3785d0ae7f12f5c7103e85994cf0de42aad7f468.png)

#

Whenever Armorers are working, they wear their masks.

That's all. I worked more on the icon than the actual pack.

# Dependencies

### REQUIRED MOD (you need one of the 2 options below)
- [OptiFine](https://www.optifine.net/home)
- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

### KNOWN COMPATIBLE PACKS (with advised order for the packs)
1. [ Working Armorers ]
2. [Zombie Villager Gloves](https://modrinth.com/project/zombie-villager-gloves)
3. [Fresh Villagolems](https://modrinth.com/project/fresh-villagolems)
4. [Fresh Sleeping Villagers](https://modrinth.com/project/fresh-sleeping-villagers)
5. [Fresh Animations Extensions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-extensions)
6. [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
7. [Villagolems Classic](https://modrinth.com/project/villagolems-classic)
8. [Villagolems Swapped](https://modrinth.com/project/villagolems-swapped)
9. [Sleeping Villagers](https://modrinth.com/project/sleeping-villagers)
10. [Baby Villagers](https://modrinth.com/project/baby-villagers)
11. [Villager Variety](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/villager-variety)
12. [Unique Spawn Eggs](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/1-13-1-16-unique-spawn-eggs)

/!\ Some packs in this list aren't compatible with each other /!\

#

- You can use this pack in any video or image freely.
- If you want to republish it, please give credit to my [Modrinth profile](https://modrinth.com/user/LeFizolof). You don't need to ask me but there must be a significant change.
